The '''''Shamunaar''''' was a frigate operated by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] named [[Biurk]].

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the ''Shamunaar'' was assigned with coordinating all the Alliance's reconnaissance and fighting forces in the [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] [[Both system|system]], and charged with preventing [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] fleets from leaving the [[Star system/Legends|system]], when it was visited by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Matric Klauskin]], who was actually under the control of [[Lumiya]]. When engaging the crew of the ''Shamunaar'' in a simulation, Klauskin locked himself and Biurk in the auxiliary bridge. Klauskin immediately fired three shots into Biurk, killing him, then proceeded to open all of the hatches on the ship, suffocating the crew. He later turned the ship over to the [[Confederation]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
